_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the missing-scope branch (C1) of the word-activities/add-picture-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders list-current-user -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get / logs (InvalidOperationException: Add Picture must be used inside a Use Word File / Word Application Scope) -> workflow source (WordAddImage is a SIBLING of UseWordFile in the outer Main Sequence, not nested in UseWordFile.Body). The combination of (InvalidOperationException about no open document scope) + (source shows Add Picture outside the Use Word File body) is decisive. Scrubbed: host->MOCK-HOST, robot->AUTOMATION1.

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
